message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title MultiCameraCore Class Diagram

package "platform" {

  class MultiCameraCore_Configuration {
    {field} - LOGGER : Logger
    {field} - id : String
    {field} - cameraConfigurationFiles : List<String>
    {field} - multiCameraGoals : List<MultiCameraGoal>
    {field} - additionalFields : Map<String, Object>
    {field} + xstream : XStream
    {field} + XML_HEADER : String
    --
    + MultiCameraCore_Configuration()
    + writeConfigurationToXML()
    + readMCPConfig()
    + createMCAppFromMCPConfigurationFile()
  }

  class MultiCameraCore {
    {field} - multiCameraGoals : List<MultiCameraGoal>
    {field} - additionalFields : Map<String, Object>
    {field} - agentActions : List<CommunicationAction>
    --
    + MultiCameraCore()
    + setup()
    + initDependencyObjects()
    + buildMCAFromConfigFile()
    + init()
    + executeMAPELoop()
    {field} - removeNewInfo()
    + monitor()
    + analyse()
    + plan()
    + execute()
    + createGlobalMap()
    + getWorkingCameras()
  }

  package "cameraManager" {
    class CameraManager {
      {field} - id : String
      {field} - cameras : List<Camera>
      {field} - cameraIdMap : Map<String, Camera>
      --
      + CameraManager()
      + initCameras()
      + heartbeat()
      + reinitNotWorkingCameras()
      + initCamera()
      + getWorkingCameras()
      + getNotWorkingCameras()
      + testSimpleAllCameras()
      + addAndInitCameras()
    }
  }

  package "utilities" {
    class Heartbeat {
      {field} △ timer : int
      {field} - cameraHeartbeatReceived : HashMap<String, Boolean>
      --
      + Heartbeat()
      + init()
      + recordHeartbeat()
      + checkHeartBeats()
    }
  }

  package "adaptation" {
    class AdaptationTypeManager {
      {field} - stringToAdaptationMap : HashMap<String, AdaptivePolicy>
      --
      + AdaptationTypeManager()
      + getAdaptivePolicy()
    }
  }

  package "imageAnalysis" {
    class AnalysisTypeManager {
      {field} - stringToAnalysisMap : HashMap<String, ImageProcessor>
      --
      + AnalysisTypeManager()
      + getImageProcessObject()
    }
  }

  package "map" {
    class GlobalMap {
      {field} - swLong : double
      {field} - swLat : double
      {field} - neLong : double
      {field} - neLat : double
      --
      + GlobalMap()
    }
  }

  MultiCameraCore o-- MultiCameraCore_Configuration : mcp_application
  MultiCameraCore o-- CameraManager : cameraManager
  MultiCameraCore o-- Heartbeat : heartbeat
  MultiCameraCore o-- AdaptationTypeManager : adaptationTypeManager
  MultiCameraCore o-- AnalysisTypeManager : analysisTypeManager
  MultiCameraCore o-- GlobalMap : globalMap

}
@enduml
```
